task_completion.description: Verify that all three [LEGACY] teams have been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The teams list should NOT show '[LEGACY] Pacific West Division', '[LEGACY] Coastal Features Desk', or '[LEGACY] Digital Pilot Program'. Confirm by viewing the teams/groups list in Socioboard.

task_completion.description: Verify that all seven newsroom teams have been created.

task_completion.description: Verify that reporters are NOT in teams they should not be in. Emily should NOT be in Breaking News. Michael should NOT be in State Politics or Investigations. Victoria should NOT be in Metro Desk. No one should be in Sports.

task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an RSS feeds section in Socioboard showing configured feeds with URLs from feeds.bbci.co.uk for world news, politics, technology, entertainment_and_arts, sport, and general news.

task_completion.description: Verify that the operational teams 'Daily Briefing' and 'Weekend Edition' still exist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The teams list should still show 'Daily Briefing' and 'Weekend Edition' teams alongside the newly created newsroom teams.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Socioboard web interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the required information into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs (profile details, teams, RSS feeds) should be entered into the actual Socioboard web forms, not a notepad or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the results appear in the genuine Socioboard application.
